data.title: Glenn Agre secures settlement for Vector Capital Credit in Anthology Chapter 11 restructuring; resolved dispute with Anthology Inc. in a deal.
data.description: A creditor has successfully resolved a dispute with the education technology company, Anthology Inc. The law firm Glenn Agre Bergman & Fuentes LLP recently announced that their client, Vector Capital Credit, has reached a settlement in the disagreement. This news comes from New York on January 29, 2026. This resolution marks a positive development in the case, highlighting effective legal negotiations between the parties involved.

data.title: Mining sector sees record operating margins in 2026 due to brownfield advantage, with capital flowing into existing sites.
data.description: A press release from Golden Goose Resources Corp. in Vancouver, BC on January 29, 2026, reveals that the global mining sector is favoring brownfield expansion. A new study indicates that a substantial amount of capital is currently being directed towards enhancing existing mining operations. This trend signifies a strategic move within the industry to maximize the potential of established mining sites rather than investing heavily in new ventures. The shift towards brownfield expansion highlights a significant change in the investment approach of mining companies, with a focus on optimizing resources and increasing profitability through the development of existing operations.

data.title: Subsea7 gets contract for Kaikias Waterflood project in US, worth 1 sizable contract with Shell.
data.description: Subsea 7 S.A. revealed today that they have secured a significant contract from Shell for the Kaikias Waterflood project. The contract, worth a substantial amount, pertains to work on the Kaikias field located in the Mars-Ursa Basin, around 210 kilometers off the coast of Louisiana, United States.

data.title: Hotel employees face 60% higher injury risks than restaurant workers, according to OysterLink analysis.
data.description: In Miami on January 29, 2026, OysterLink, a career platform focusing on the hospitality industry, published a recent study based on federal workplace safety information. The data indicates that hotel workers are subjected to a notably greater risk of injuries compared to their peers in the restaurant field. The analysis highlights concerning disparities in safety conditions, emphasizing the need for improved safety protocols to safeguard employees.

data.title: Inventor creates SAF-T-BAG travel/tote bag, prioritizing style, versatility, practicality, and safety with innovative design.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, an inventor from Chicago, Illinois shared their vision for the SAF-T-BAG, a travel bag designed to be stylish, versatile, and practical for carrying a wide range of personal items. The inventor aimed to enhance safety by incorporating illuminating features into the bag.

data.title: Global Custody Transfer Metering Skids Market expected to reach USD 26,205.3 million by 2032 with 5.67% CAGR.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in London, it was reported that the Global Custody Transfer Metering Skids Market is experiencing consistent growth due to increasing need for precise measurement in energy transactions. Valued at USD 10,480.4 million in 2018, the market is projected to continue its upward trajectory.

data.title: Florida Poly received $2.9M for new AI and cybersecurity lab, boosting education and innovation.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on January 29, 2026, Florida Polytechnic University announced a significant development in cybersecurity and artificial intelligence education. The university secured $2.9 million in federal funding to establish the Public Service Applied Innovation Laboratory (PSAIL). This investment aims to enhance education and research in these critical fields. The laboratory is set to play a pivotal role in serving the community and fostering innovation in the sector.

data.title: Thoropass launches Smart Sort AI to transform GRC export into audit-ready evidence; aids security, compliance teams.
data.description: In New York, Thoropass, a cybersecurity auditor, introduced Smart Sort AI on its Audit Lifecycle Platform. This AI feature allows companies to extract data from any GRC tool and convert it into audit-ready evidence. Smart Sort AI streamlines the audit process for security and compliance teams using various software systems for risk management. This new feature aims to enhance efficiency by simplifying data export and preparation, ultimately improving the overall audit experience.

data.title: CIM Group finishes 168-unit Coro apartment complex in LA's West Adams neighborhood.
data.description: CIM Group has recently finished the construction of Coro, a new apartment complex located in the West Adams area of Los Angeles. Coro consists of 168 units and is now available for occupancy.

data.title: Redken is the official hair care partner of the 2026 Grammy Awards®, featuring debut of Acidic Bonding Concentrate Hair Bandage Balm.
data.description: During Grammy® Week, Redken, the top professional hair brand in the U.S., unveiled the Acidic Bonding Concentrate Hair Bandage Balm in New York on Jan. 29, 2026. This product launch solidified its position as a key player in the industry.
